headline: AMD (AMD) Buys MEXT To Tackle AI Data Center Memory Bottlenecks
summary: Advanced Micro Devices (NasdaqGS:AMD) has agreed to acquire MEXT, an AI native memory optimization company focused on data center workloads. The deal targets memory bottlenecks in enterprise and cloud AI environments, with MEXT's technology expected to be integrated into AMD's data center portfolio. The acquisition supports AMD's push to build a more complete AI infrastructure stack across both hardware and software layers. Advanced Micro Devices enters this deal with strong recent stock...

headline: Intel shares rise after Trump announces Apple partnership
summary: STORY: ::Intel::ArchiveShares of Intel rose as much as nearly 12% on Thursday, after U.S. President Donald Trump said the company would partner with Apple on chip design and production...:: Intelin what would be a major boost for Intel's efforts to turn around its business. A contract with Apple would lock in steady demand from the iPhone maker, boosting Intel's reputation and sales as it looks to close the gap with rival TSMC, the world's biggest contract chipmaker.::Archive::AMDFor Apple, the deal would help diversify its manufacturing base and add chip capacity at a time when TSMC, its key partner, has been stretched thin by surging demand from AI chip-making clients such as Nvidia and AMD.Trump's social media post about the agreement did not specify which chips Intel would make for Apple.The president said it was his latest effort to help Intel, in which the U.S. government has a 10% stake.::ArchiveThe Trump administration has been stepping up efforts to secure U.S. supply chains for semiconductors and critical minerals, including taking equity stakes in companies to reduce reliance on China.Apple and Intel did not immediately respond to Reuters requests for comment.

headline: Dell (DELL) Powers Cambridge AI Supercomputers For Climate, Healthcare And Fusion Research
summary: Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) is supplying key infrastructure for the University of Cambridge’s new Zenith and Sunrise AI supercomputers. The partnership with Cambridge and AMD focuses on national-scale AI systems for scientific and research use. The platforms are intended to support projects in climate modeling, healthcare research, fusion energy, and materials science. Dell Technologies is best known for its PCs, servers, and enterprise storage, and the Cambridge projects spotlight a...

headline: Rackspace Technology (RXT) Is Up 42.5% After Cost-Cutting To Fund AMD-Powered AI Expansion
summary: Earlier this month, Rackspace Technology announced a phased agreement with AMD to deploy 30 MW of AMD AI compute across its global data centers through 2028, while approving a workforce realignment that will cut about 15% of its global staff and incur an estimated US$14.00 million to US$19.00 million in one-time charges during 2026. The company plans to redirect much of the expected US$75.00 million to US$85.00 million in annualized cost savings toward building governed enterprise AI...

headline: Trump says Apple to work with Intel to manufacture chips in US
summary: U.S. President Donald Trump said in a ‌Truth Social post on ‌Thursday that Apple had agreed to ​work with Intel to design and build its chips in the United States.  Intel had reached a ‌preliminary deal ⁠to make some chips for Apple, following discussions ⁠that went on for more than a year, the ​Wall Street ​Journal reported ​in May.  Apple and ‌Intel did not immediately respond to a Reuters request for comment outside regular business hours.
